rdf:Description.dc:description: Frequency evolution |Δf₁/f₁,0| vs S/D for dense (T1 vs T4) and loose (T2 vs T5) pairs, with linear fits and dry–saturated gap annotations. Companion to j3-effect-saturation: same data, different framing. In the submitted manuscript as fig9_compare_evolution.
